content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all changes across 10 source files and 4 test files. The implementation adds 4 query types (run history lineage, task detail lineage, bead execution history, milestone task listing) with correct plan-hash staleness detection, graceful fallback on missing/corrupt plans, proper backward compatibility (all new fields are Option or #[serde(default)]), and comprehensive test coverage including stale-plan, missing-plan, corrupt-plan, and mixed-plan-hash edge cases. Duration computation correctly handles negative intervals via signed_duration_since().to_std().ok(). All tests pass, clippy is clean with -D warnings, and fmt --check passes. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
